SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AiController
GraphQL Controller that exposes the Orasaka AI capabilities as queries, mutations, and subscriptions.
AuthContracts
Group of immutable authentication data contracts.
AuthContracts.LoginRequest
Request data containing credentials.
AuthContracts.OAuthRequest
Request data containing OAuth profile details.
AuthContracts.RegisterRequest
Request data containing registration details.
AuthContracts.RegisterResult
Result of registration indicating either success or failure.
AuthContracts.VerifyTokenRequest
Request payload for verifying account tokens.
CachedBodyHttpServletRequest
Caches incoming HTTP request body bytes so they can be read multiple times.
ChatStreamController
REST controller exposing real-time Server-Sent Events (SSE) chat streaming and media analysis.
ChatStreamService
Service orchestrating AI chat streaming flows for SSE and GraphQL subscriptions.
GatewayApplication
Entry point for the Orasaka Gateway Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) application.
GatewayErrorResolver
Unified gateway exception resolver handling REST and GraphQL endpoints.
GatewayProperties
Configuration properties record for environment-driven Orasaka gateway settings.
GatewayProperties.CorsProperties
CORS policy configuration properties.
IdentityJpaConfiguration
 
MediaContracts
Group of immutable media data contracts for multi-modal ingestion.
MediaContracts.AnalyzeAudioRequest
Request containing base64 encoded audio track clip.
MediaContracts.AnalyzePosterRequest
Request containing base64 encoded poster image.
OrasakaOperationGraphController
REST controller exposing the compiled capability Operation Graph matrix.
OrasakaOperationGraphFilter
Infrastructure filter verifying capability availability from the Orasaka Operation Graph.
OrasakaSecurityFilter
 
RateLimitConfig
Conditional configuration class for the dynamic rate limiting engine.
RateLimitFilter
 
RateLimitProperties
Configuration properties record for environment-driven Orasaka rate limiting settings.
SecurityConfig
Stateless Spring Security configuration for the orasaka-gateway module.
